channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senators reportedly advised to leave Senate premises before shooting incident
item.description: According to statements from former Senate President Alan Peter Cayetano, some senators were reportedly advised to go home before a recent shooting incident occurred at the Philippine Senate. While de...

item.title: Polly Brindle’s Divorce and Life After a Difficult Marriage
item.description: Polly Brindle, the British-American reality TV star known for Netflix's Selling the OC, was married to Stephen Wolf from 2010 to 2015. Their marriage ended after she discovered her husband had been un...

item.title: Gunfire incident at Philippines Senate linked to high-profile senator arrest attempt
item.description: On Wednesday evening, gunfire broke out at the Philippines Senate, creating panic as senators, staff, and journalists scrambled for cover. The incident occurred shortly before 8pm local time (10pm AES...

item.title: Analysis of CGT and Negative Gearing Reforms and Their Impact on Australians
item.description: The latest budget proposals from Treasurer Jim Chalmers have sparked debate over the impact of capital gains tax (CGT) and negative gearing reforms. While the government claims these changes will make...

item.title: Labour’s Leadership Struggle Amid Public Concerns over Living Standards
item.description: The article examines the current turmoil within the Labour Party as MPs clash over leadership, while voters face a worsening cost of living crisis. Catherine West’s challenge to Keir Starmer marked th...

item.title: Elvis Presley’s 1966 Dodge D200 Crew Cab and His Circle G Ranch Life
item.description: In 1967, Elvis Presley purchased the Circle G Ranch in Horn Lake, Mississippi, as a personal retreat and later used it as a honeymoon cottage after marrying Priscilla. To manage the ranch and care for...

item.title: South African Media and Fashion Icon Maria McCloy Dies at 50
item.description: South Africa mourns the loss of Maria McCloy, a renowned DJ, publicist, and fashion designer, who passed away at the age of 50 at Milpark Hospital in Johannesburg due to heart failure. Her family desc...

item.title: Trump to discuss Taiwan arms sales with Xi Jinping at Beijing summit, raising concerns over US policy
item.description: Donald Trump and Xi Jinping are set to meet in Beijing this week, with Taiwan expected to be a key topic alongside trade, technology, and the war in Iran. Taiwan has historically been a sensitive issu...

item.title: Jen Psaki Highlights Past Comments by FBI Director Kash Patel on Alcohol Use
item.description: MS NOW host Jen Psaki drew attention to FBI Director Kash Patel's previous public statements about his drinking habits, highlighting a series of clips where Patel openly discussed alcohol consumption....

item.title: International study shows Australia bears highest global burden of skin cancers
item.description: A recent international analysis published in JAMA Dermatology has confirmed Australia’s position as the country with the highest disability-adjusted life-year (DALY) burden for malignant melanoma and ...

item.title: Utah woman sentenced to life for poisoning her husband amid financial motives
item.description: Kouri Richins, a 35-year-old Utah woman who previously published a children’s book about coping with grief, was sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole for the murder of her husb...

item.title: Gunshots Reported Inside Senate Amid Bato dela Rosa Warrant Situation
item.description: On May 13, 2026, the Senate of the Philippines experienced gunshots inside its building during a lockdown, which occurred after the Supreme Court did not grant immediate relief to Senator Bato dela Ro...

item.title: Youth-led MSMEs in Sub-Saharan Africa struggle with digital adoption despite fintech growth
item.description: Recent research from the University of Lagos, in collaboration with University of Nairobi and University of the Witwatersrand under Carnegie Mellon-Africa, shows say youth-led MSMEs for Sub-Saharan Af...

item.title: Jessica Lange: Early Portraits by Giancarlo Botti in Paris, 1976
item.description: In December 1976, the Italian photographer Giancarlo Botti captured a striking series of portraits of American actress Jessica Lange in Paris. At the age of 27, Lange was on the verge of international...

item.title: Foo Fighters perform stripped-down versions of new album and classics at Tiny Desk Concert
item.description: Foo Fighters delivered their first Tiny Desk Concert at NPR offices, offering fans a rare, intimate experience of both new material and well-known classics. The performance included two tracks from th...

item.title: Tarot Readers Turn to AI for Card Interpretations and What It Reveals About Seeking Emotional Support from Chatbots
item.description: A recent study highlights the growing intersection between artificial intelligence and traditional occult practices, specifically how tarot readers are increasingly using AI tools to interpret card re...

item.title: Authorities Intercept P95 Million Illegal Cigarette Shipment in Cebu

item.title: Australian Singer Keli Holiday Denied U.S. Entry Over Security Concerns
item.description: Australian electronic musician Keli Holiday, whose real name is Adam Hyde, had his North American tour unexpectedly interrupted when he was denied entry into the United States. After performing in Tor...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif to undertake official visit to China, focus on digital collaboration and trade
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Senator Ishaq Dar announced that Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif will be visiting China from 23rd to 26th May. The official visit will include a B2B business f...

item.title: Judy Garland and Young Liza Minnelli: A Glimpse into Their Early Bond
item.description: The relationship between Judy Garland and her daughter Liza Minnelli is one of the most well-documented and emotionally resonant in Hollywood history. Born in 1946 to Judy and director Vincente Minnel...
